decisions.text: Project scope confirmed: 3-level penthouse, 7800 sqft. Quiet Luxury aesthetic with Indian Modern accents. Sara is the final aesthetic call. Project completion target: 15 Nov 2026. Total fee ₹68L.

Quiet Luxury direction approved. Sara requested 30% more brass detailing. CMF locked: warm woods (walnut + oak), travertine + statuario, fabric walls, brushed brass. No marble overload. Materials to highlight art collection.

actionItems.text: More brass detailing - CMF locked: warm woods (walnut + oak), travertine + statuario, fabric walls, brushed brass. No marble overload. Materials to highlight art collection.

decisions.text: All 38 DD drawings approved. Two markups: master closet door swing changed to right-hand, powder room WC moved 200mm to gain ventilation clearance. Lighting selections confirmed including Magari chandelier on 16-week lead.

BOQ totalling ₹2.85Cr (excluding design fee) approved. Atlas awarded civil + finishing. Sahil Bharti awarded custom joinery. Klove + Magari sourcing approved. Procurement schedule to track 18-week lead items: chandelier, kitchen, wardrobes.

moms.title: Site Walkthrough — MEP First Fix Sign-off

decisions.text: MEP first-fix signed off across Lower + Upper levels. No reworks needed. Walnut veneer installation cleared to begin May 12. Terrace waterproofing test scheduled for May 22 before IPE decking begins.

comms.preview: Hi Sara, the Quiet Luxury moodboard is ready. Three sub-directions explored — wanted to walk you through them in person. Free this Friday afternoon?
comms.subject: Concept Moodboard ready for review

comms.preview: Meher hi! Both Arjun and I really loved the brass touches in the moodboard — can we add more of it across the design? Especially for the bar nook and library wall.
comms.subject: Loved the brass details

comms.preview: Quick one — for the Calacatta Viola in master bath, can we see physical samples this weekend? I want to make sure the purple veining is consistent across the slabs you've identified.
comms.subject: Question about master bath marble

comms.preview: Hi Arjun, attaching site photos from this week. MEP first-fix is now complete across both levels. Walnut veneer panel installation begins next Tuesday. Two minor items needing your wife's decision attached.
comms.subject: Site progress update — Week 11

comms.preview: Riya didi, Atlas team asking if waterproofing test results can be shared with their site engineer before IPE order is placed. They want documentation for warranty.
comms.subject: Atlas crew query on terrace waterproofing

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What is the format?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Sub-type — kitchen-heavy vs display-heavy needs differ massively.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Is this a new HQ, a refresh, or a regional office?
What type of development is this?
Just to confirm — this enquiry is for your home? If so, what kind?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Validates the studio assumption about property type before everything else.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What kind of space is this?
What is the scope you need us for?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Defines the engagement type — sample flat is very different from full common areas.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What does your business do?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.placeholder: e.g. SaaS startup, accounting practice, architecture studio...

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Is this a first location, or part of a chain?
Total area (sqft)
What stage is the home at right now?
options: Under construction, design needed before move-in
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Defines whether this is interior design, renovation, or design-during-construction. Major scope-shaper.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Roughly how large is the home? (built-up area in sqft)
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Auto-derives Size tier (Small/Medium/Large/XL) for siteSize master.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: How many people will work here at peak?
Number of floors?
Total project size?
Total area (sqft)
Total space size (sqft)
Seating capacity OR daily footfall target
Stage of construction?
Total headcount the space serves at peak?
How many bedrooms?
Stage of the space?
Who lives here, and who is deciding?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Reveals decision-maker dynamics and lifestyle needs.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What is the space currently?
Is the space ready, or under construction?
Who is the typical end-customer for this project?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Design aesthetic must match buyer tier.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What is the design + build budget?
What is the design budget for what we would handle?
What is your design instinct? Pick the closest 2-3.
options: Don't know yet — that's what the designer is for
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Style match — early indicator of compatibility.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What is the design fees + execution budget?
Owned or leased? If leased, how many years left?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Investment justification — short leases = lighter design.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Target opening date?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Retail/hospitality has hard launch deadlines — major qualifier.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What zones do you need? (Pick all that apply)
Procurement model?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Engagement type — tender is heavy commitment.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: When do you need design ready by?
Have you worked with an architect or interior designer before?
options: Doing parts ourselves, want a designer for the rest
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: First-timers need more hand-holding; "ended badly" needs sensitivity.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Brand direction — already set or still defining?
options: Just an idea, need help building brand

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What is your realistic budget range for design + execution? (We will not share this — it just helps us not waste your time.)
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: THE single biggest qualifier. Studios that do not take small-budget projects need to filter out early.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: Who are the stakeholders we would present to?
What is the design + build budget?
Have you worked with interior design studios before?
options: Have an in-house team, need supplementary

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: When do you need to move in / start operations?
Who is the primary decision-maker we would be presenting to?
Style direction?
When do you want to start the design work?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Urgency. "Just exploring" is a low-priority lead.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What zones / typologies are needed?
When do you want to move in / complete?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Realism check — match start vs end.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What part of the design intent is most critical?
MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Reveals what the developer cares about.

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.text: What experience should a customer remember?

MasterQuestionnaireQuestions.whyItMatters: Reveals storytelling capacity of the client.

Certifications required?

Reference projects (yours or competitors') you would want to benchmark
